description: You are configuring GPredict for the Pennsylvania Emergency Management Agency's regional satellite communication network. Update the Pittsburgh ground station with an altitude of 230 meters and weather station code KPIT. Add a ground station for Erie, PA (42.1292 N, 80.0851 W, altitude 222 meters, weather station KEIE) and a ground station for Harrisburg, PA (40.2732 N, 76.8867 W, altitude 102 meters, weather station KMDT). Update the RACES module to include AO-85 (Fox-1A, NORAD 40967) and the ISS (ZARYA, NORAD 25544) while ensuring SO-50 (NORAD 27607) remains in the module. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

natural_language.prompt: I'm the regional EMCOMM coordinator for the Pennsylvania Emergency Management Agency. I need you to fix our GPredict satellite tracking configuration. The Pittsburgh ground station has the wrong altitude — it should be 230 meters (not what's currently set), and the weather station code should be KPIT. Add two missing ground stations: Erie PA (42.1292N, 80.0851W, 222m alt, KEIE weather station) and Harrisburg PA (40.2732N, 76.8867W, 102m alt, KMDT weather station). Also, our RACES tracking module is incomplete — it only has SO-50 in it. Add AO-85 (Fox-1A, NORAD 40967) and ISS (ZARYA, NORAD 25544) to the RACES module so we can track all three of our approved EMCOMM satellites.
